name: Microsoft Intune
description: Monitor device compliance, enrollment status, and compliance policy coverage across your Intune-managed device fleet

config.setupInstructions: Register an app in Microsoft Entra ID (Azure Portal > App registrations). Under API permissions, add Microsoft Graph delegated permissions: DeviceManagementManagedDevices.Read.All, DeviceManagementConfiguration.Read.All, ServiceHealth.Read.All. Grant admin consent for the tenant. Requires an active Intune license.

checks.name: Device Compliance Status
checks.description: Checks that all Intune-managed devices are in a compliant state based on assigned compliance policies

checks.name: Device Inventory
checks.description: Collects an inventory of all enrolled Intune-managed devices as compliance evidence

checks.name: Compliance Policy Coverage
checks.description: Verifies that device compliance policies are defined in Intune to enforce security standards like encryption, passwords, and OS updates
